cases.answer_preview: It is not recommended to use your OMEN laptop directly on your lap or bed for long gaming sessions. Doing so can obstruct the computer's air vents, leading to overheating and potential heat-related injuries. It's best to use the laptop on a hard, flat surface to ensure proper airflow (OMEN 17.3 inch
